name: SHIFT TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: SHIFT TECHNOLOGIES INC is an end-to-end auto ecommerce platform transforming the car-buying experience. The company offers a technology-driven, hassle-free way to buy and sell used cars online, providing vehicle reconditioning and a virtual dealership experience headquartered in San Francisco, California. Shift aims to make car ownership simple by handling trade-ins, financing, and service through its platform.
